translations.item: Genereaza continut in website cu AI
Generate content based on AI responses

queries.item: CREATE TABLE `?:ai_content` ( `content_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `product_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `template_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `companion_model` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `request` longtext NOT NULL, `image_path` varchar(1000) NOT NULL, `response` longtext NOT NULL, `status` char(1) NOT NULL, `applied` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N', `score` int(3) NOT NULL, `timestamp` double NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`content_id`), KEY `product_id` (`product_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=191 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci

CREATE TABLE `?:ai_templates` ( `template_id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `template_name` varchar(1000) NOT NULL, `companion_model` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gpt-3.5-turbo', `prompt` mediumtext NOT NULL, `fields_to_include` mediumtext NOT NULL, `fields_to_generate` mediumtext NOT NULL, `max_tokens` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `temperature` decimal(15,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, `top_p` decimal(15,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, `assistant_id` varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`template_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci
